title: Scorched Guns: Caverns & Chasms Compat
description: A new tier of guns and enemy faction for Scorched Guns based on the mod Caverns & Chasms.
body:
![_Guns, guns guns!_](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6db19b8057dd665fd0bd967341f98e9451e66737_0.webp)

# About:
**Scorched Guns: Caverns & Chasms** is a mod that integration and themed content around Caverns & Chasms, featuring 2 new gun tiers, additions to existing tiers and extensive compatibility!

# Compatibility
Bullets ricochet off tin blocks and Grazers' shells.

# Content
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

## Ammo
**Hex Rounds**
A round that deals half of the gun's damage as magic damage, piercing armor.

**Bluntshot**
A shotgun round that deals heavy knockback to targets.

**Hexshot**
Shotgun shell that shoots a spread of silver bullets, which deal half of the round's damage as magic damage, piercing armor.

**Copper Slug**
A slug that deals hefty damage and knockback but is affected by gravity.

**Ricoshot Rounds**
A rifle round that bounces when hitting blocks, increasing crit damage and chance for each bounce.

## Guns
**Hangman Carabine**
A rapid firing carabine chambered in Compact Hex Rounds.

**Ribcage**
A heavy marksman bolt-action rifle chambered in Hex Rounds 

**Bella**
A pistol chambered in Compact Hex Rounds

**Rehearse**
A revolver chambered in Hex Rounds

**Silver Lining**
An magazine-fed auto-crossbow firing Large Arrows.

**Keteriya**
A single-shot break action shotgun chambered in Bluntshot with a hefty knockback. Can also fire Hexshot Shells.

**Gallows**
Full-power automatic rifle chambered in Hex Rounds.

**Necrosis**
Pump-action shotgun chambered in Hexshot Shells

**Anathema**
A rapid-fire "SMG" that fires corrosive blood. Ammo is the enemy itself.

**Mortician**
A small pistol capable of shooting both Compact Hex Rounds and Compact Advanced Rounds.

**Cacophony**
A light-machine gun rapidly firing full Hex Rounds.

**Lustre**
A heavy energy laser cannon with extreme armor penetration.

**Electrothermal Autocannon**
A plasma HMG that uses energy as ammo, overheats during sustained fire.

**Scatterer**
A plasma pistol that uses energy as ammo, can charge up to fire a shotgun blast.

**Iron Partisan, Recur, Rascal and Charybdis**
Guns that fire Ricoshot rounds for Iron, Diamond Steel, Treated Brass and Scorched tiers, respectively.

## Structures
**Graveyard**
A small graveyard with something hidden below, found in all Taiga biomes.

**Soul Outpost**
A small nether structure found in Soul Sand valleys.

**Necropolis**
Large castle ruins occupied by Gravekeepers, found rarely in all Taiga biomes.
</details>



# Cross-compatibility:
- Create
- Immersive Engineering
